ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy carrier (e.g., COKING_COAL, NATURAL_GAS) */,
  "carrier_type" TEXT /* Type of the energy carrier (e.g., Fossil Fuel, Renewable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy carrier */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit in which the energy carrier is measured */,
  "carbon_intensity" REAL /* Carbon intensity of the energy carrier (kg CO2 per unit of energy) */,
  "renewable_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the energy carrier is renewable */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the energy carrier (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical region */,
  "geo_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region (e.g., INDIA, ER) */,
  "parent_geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent geographical region (e.g., INDIA for ER) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which data is collected */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a leap year */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Winter, Summer) */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the season */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "day_types" (
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day type */,
  "day_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the day type (e.g., Weekday, Weekend) */,
  "average_energy_consumption" REAL /* Average energy consumption on this day type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "day_slices" (
  "day_slice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day slice */,
  "day_slice_name" TEXT /* Name of the day slice (e.g., Morning, Evening) */,
  "peak_hour" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day slice is during peak hours */,
  "average_energy_consumption" REAL /* Average energy consumption during this time slice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_slice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_supply" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy supply record */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy carrier */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day type */,
  "day_slice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day slice */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical region */,
  "dom_supply_from" REAL /* Domestic supply from the region */,
  "external_supply_from" REAL /* External supply to the region */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply (domestic + external) */,
  "supply_source" TEXT /* Source of the supply (e.g., mines, refineries) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_supply_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_supply_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_supply_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_supply_day_slice_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_slice_id") REFERENCES day_slices ("day_slice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_supply_day_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_type_id") REFERENCES day_types ("day_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_supply_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES energy_carriers ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_demand" (
  "demand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy demand record */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy carrier */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day type */,
  "day_slice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day slice */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical region */,
  "demand_amount" REAL /* Demand amount for the energy carrier */,
  "demand_source" TEXT /* Source of the demand (e.g., industrial, residential) */,
  "forecasted_demand" REAL /* Forecasted demand for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_demand_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_demand_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES energy_carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_demand_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_demand_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_demand_day_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_type_id") REFERENCES day_types ("day_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_demand_day_slice_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_slice_id") REFERENCES day_slices ("day_slice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy distribution record */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy carrier */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day type */,
  "day_slice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day slice */,
  "source_geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source geographical region */,
  "destination_geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination geographical region */,
  "distribution_amount" REAL /* Amount of energy distributed */,
  "distribution_mode" TEXT /* Mode of distribution (e.g., pipeline, truck) */,
  "distribution_cost" REAL /* Cost of distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_distribution_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES energy_carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_distribution_day_slice_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_slice_id") REFERENCES day_slices ("day_slice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_distribution_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_distribution_day_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_type_id") REFERENCES day_types ("day_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_distribution_destination_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_distribution_source_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_distribution_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy import record */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy carrier */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day type */,
  "day_slice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day slice */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical region */,
  "import_amount" REAL /* Amount of energy imported */,
  "import_source" TEXT /* Source of the import (e.g., country, company) */,
  "import_cost" REAL /* Cost of the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_imports_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES energy_carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_imports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_imports_day_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_type_id") REFERENCES day_types ("day_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_imports_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_imports_day_slice_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_slice_id") REFERENCES day_slices ("day_slice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_imports_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_export" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy export record */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy carrier */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day type */,
  "day_slice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day slice */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical region */,
  "export_amount" REAL /* Amount of energy exported */,
  "export_destination" TEXT /* Destination of the export (e.g., country, company) */,
  "export_profit" REAL /* Profit from the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_export_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_export_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES energy_carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_export_day_slice_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_slice_id") REFERENCES day_slices ("day_slice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_export_day_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_type_id") REFERENCES day_types ("day_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_export_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_export_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_reserves" (
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy reserve record */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy carrier */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical region */,
  "reserve_amount" REAL /* Amount of energy reserve */,
  "reserve_status" TEXT /* Status of the reserve (e.g., available, reserved) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the reserve was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reserve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reserves_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reserves_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reserves_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES energy_carriers ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy price record */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy carrier */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day type */,
  "day_slice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day slice */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical region */,
  "price_amount" REAL /* Price of the energy carrier */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price (e.g., market, government) */,
  "price_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the price (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_prices_day_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_type_id") REFERENCES day_types ("day_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_prices_day_slice_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_slice_id") REFERENCES day_slices ("day_slice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_prices_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_prices_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES energy_carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_prices_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_prices_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., planning, analysis) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time data record */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy carrier */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical region */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the real-time data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the real-time data (e.g., sensor, IoT device) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES energy_carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id")
)
